panels.title: Avg Latency
panels.description: Shows the mean query latency for this database over the selected time range. A rising value may indicate lock contention or growing dataset size.

panels.title: p95 Latency
panels.description: Represents the 95th-percentile query duration for this database. Watch for sudden jumps that signal slow-query regressions affecting most users.

panels.title: p99 Latency
panels.description: Represents the 99th-percentile query duration for this database. Spikes here reveal tail-latency issues that impact a small but significant fraction of queries.

panels.title: Total Operations
panels.description: Shows the total number of database operations observed for this database. Use this to gauge overall query volume and detect unexpected traffic changes.

panels.title: Latency by Operation
panels.description: Tracks query latency over time, grouped by operation type for this database. Look for operations whose latency diverges from the baseline.
